title: V-Mart Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)

jsonLd.title: V-Mart Retail is Hiring: Floor Manager (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Floor Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!
